title: PlexMod - Mineplex
description: A handful of QoL client-side tweaks for Mineplex.
body:
# PlexMod - Mineplex

![PlexMod main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mapUnco9/images/ed7cbdab16d67d04a3c0b25422cae4850b94e070.png)

PlexMod is a client mod for Minecraft that adds a handful of QoL tweaks for Mineplex. You can open the menu with the default keybind **K**, or change it in the vanilla keybind menu.

**Features:**

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| **Quick Join** | Adds a "Join Mineplex" button directly to the main menu |
| **AutoTaunt** | Automatically `/taunt` at the start of a game |
| **AutoGL** | Sends a custom message at the start of a game |
| **AutoGG** | Sends a custom message at the end of a game |
| **AutoFriend** | Automatically accepts all incoming friend requests |
| **Discord Presence** | Displays your current game on Discord |
| **Cleaner Lobbies** | Removes portal sounds and boss bars in the hub |
| **Chat Cycle** | Cycles between Party, Team, and Private Message chat |

The mod supports the latest version of Fabric and Forge for 1.8.9.

Feel free to join the Discord to report bugs, or request features.
